provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models an empty-required-field case where conservative non-repair is correct.

request_tools.name: send_email
request_tools.description: Send an email to a recipient.

note: The required `to` field is present but blank, and the output offers no recipient anywhere, so any repair would fabricate an email address; no_tool is the correct conservative label.
